COURT OF APPEAL Remittitur Received - IN LIGHT OF THE FOREGOING, THE PETITION FOR A WRIT OF HABEAS CORPUS IS GRANTED.  THE SUPERIOR COURT'S SEPTEMBER 3, 2024 ORDER DENYING PRETRIAL RELEASE IS VACATED.  WE REMAND THE MATTER TO THE SUPERIOR COURT TO RECONSIDER PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR PRETRIAL RELEASE IN ACCORDANCE WITH IN RE HUMPHREY, SUPRA, 11 CAL. 5TH 135.
